lessons.title: Choosing Your Project
lessons.description: Grade 3 INTEGRATED PROJECTS - Selecting a science project topic that interests you.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

It is time to choose your science project topic! A good project starts with a topic that interests you. In this lesson, you will learn how to choose a project that you will enjoy working on.

## Main Content

**How to Choose a Topic**

Think about science topics that interest you. Consider what you have learned this year. Choose a question you can investigate with simple materials. Make sure your project can be completed in the time available. Ask your teacher for help if you need ideas.

blocks.content: It is time to choose your science project topic! A good project starts with a topic that interests you.

terms.definition: A planned piece of work to learn about a topic
The subject you will study
To study something carefully to learn more about it
Something you want to learn more about

lessons.titleThai: เลือกโครงการของคุณ

lessons.title: Research and Preparation
lessons.description: Grade 3 INTEGRATED PROJECTS - Researching your project topic and preparing for your experiment.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Before you start your experiment, you need to research your topic. Research means finding out what other people have already learned about your topic. This helps you plan your own experiment.

## Main Content

**Doing Research**

Read books about your topic. Ask adults what they know. Look at what scientists have discovered. Write down important facts. Use your research to make a better prediction and plan a better experiment.

blocks.content: Before you start your experiment, you need to research your topic. Research means finding out what other people have already learned about your topic.

terms.definition: Finding information about a topic from different sources
To get ready for something

terms.thai: แหล่งข้อมูล
terms.definition: A place where information comes from

lessons.titleThai: การวิจัยและการเตรียมตัว

lessons.title: Conducting Your Experiment
lessons.description: Grade 3 INTEGRATED PROJECTS - Carrying out your science experiment carefully.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Now it is time to conduct your experiment! This means carrying out the steps you planned. Follow your plan carefully and record everything you observe.

## Main Content

**Conducting Your Experiment**

Follow your experiment plan step by step. Record your observations as you go. Take measurements accurately. If something unexpected happens, write it down. Repeat your experiment if you have time. Be patient and careful.

blocks.content: Now it is time to conduct your experiment! This means carrying out the steps you planned.

terms.definition: To carry out an experiment or activity

terms.thai: อย่างระมัดระวัง
terms.definition: In a way that avoids mistakes
To look at something carefully and notice details
Able to wait without getting upset

lessons.titleThai: การทดลองของคุณ

lessons.title: Analyzing Data
lessons.description: Grade 3 INTEGRATED PROJECTS - Analyzing experiment results and drawing conclusions.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

After you finish your experiment, you need to analyze your data. Analyzing means looking at your results carefully to find patterns and draw conclusions. In this lesson, you will learn how to analyze your data.

## Main Content

**How to Analyze Data**

Look at all your measurements and observations. Make charts or graphs to organize your data. Look for patterns or trends. Compare your results to your prediction. Write conclusions based on what your data shows, not what you hoped it would show.

blocks.content: After you finish your experiment, you need to analyze your data. Analyzing means looking at your results carefully to find patterns and draw conclusions.

terms.definition: To examine information carefully to find patterns
Something that repeats in a predictable way
A visual display of data using lines or bars
A general direction of change

lessons.titleThai: การวิเคราะห์ข้อมูล

lessons.title: Creating Your Display
lessons.description: Grade 3 INTEGRATED PROJECTS - Creating a science fair display board for your project.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Now you will create a display board for your science project. Your display should tell the story of your project clearly and attractively. In this lesson, you will learn how to create an effective display.

## Main Content

**Display Board Tips**

Include your question, prediction, procedure, results, and conclusion. Use clear headings and labels. Add pictures, charts, and diagrams. Make your text large enough to read. Organize information from left to right. Check for spelling errors.

blocks.content: Now you will create a display board for your science project. Your display should tell the story of your project clearly and attractively.

terms.definition: A visual presentation of information
A title or label at the top of a section
The steps followed in an experiment

lessons.titleThai: การสร้างนิทรรศการ

lessons.title: Presenting Your Findings
lessons.description: Grade 3 INTEGRATED PROJECTS - Presenting your science project to classmates and judges.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

It is time to present your science project! You will share what you learned with your classmates and teacher. Practice presenting clearly and confidently.

## Main Content

**Presentation Tips**

Speak clearly and loudly. Look at your audience. Explain each part of your project. Be ready to answer questions. Practice beforehand. Be proud of your work, even if your prediction was wrong. Scientists learn from every experiment.

blocks.content: It is time to present your science project! You will share what you learned with your classmates and teacher.

terms.definition: To show and explain something to others
Feeling sure about your abilities
People who watch a presentation

lessons.titleThai: การนำเสนอผลการค้นพบ

lessons.title: Unit 9 Review
lessons.description: Grade 3 INTEGRATED PROJECTS - Review activity for the science project process.
lessons.content:
## Review Activity

Review everything you learned about planning and conducting science projects! Reflect on your own project experience and identify what you did well and what you could improve.

blocks.content: Review everything you learned about planning and conducting science projects!

terms.definition: To think carefully about something
To make something better

lessons.titleThai: ทบทวนหน่วย 9

lessons.title: Unit 9 Summative Assessment
lessons.description: Grade 3 INTEGRATED PROJECTS - Summative assessment covering the science project process.
lessons.content:
## Summative Assessment

This assessment covers everything you learned about science projects in Unit 9. You will be tested on planning, conducting, analyzing, and presenting science projects.

blocks.content: This assessment covers everything you learned about science projects in Unit 9. Good luck!

lessons.titleThai: แบบทดสอบปลายหน่วย หน่วย 9
